This restructuring shows Meta's growing commitment to artificial intelligence.

articles.title: Claude outage: Anthropic says working on fix, and other details
articles.description: India and the US witnessed a significant disruption in Anthropic's AI chatbot, Claude, on June 2. Hundreds of users faced access issues, with Claude Chat being the most affected. While Anthropic acknowledged a partial outage across multiple products, including Claude.ai and its API, the exact cause and recovery timeline remain unclear. This follows similar incidents in April.

articles.title: After repeatedly telling that some entire job categories will be 'totally, totally gone' due to AI, Sam Altman now says that companies who have adopted AI the most are ones hiring the most as ...
articles.description: OpenAI's Sam Altman now contends that AI adoption correlates with increased hiring, not job losses. He suggests companies blaming layoffs on AI might be underutilizing the technology, calling it a "convenient way" to explain cuts. Altman believes human interaction and expertise remain central, with successful AI integration augmenting, not replacing, workers.

articles.title: ET Most Innovative AI Product Awards 2026: How AI-powered legal technology is transforming legal research, compliance and contract management

As legal teams face growing volumes of contracts, regulatory requirements, compliance obligations, and litigation data, AI-powered legal technology is helping professionals work faster, reduce risk, improve decision-making, and drive greater operational efficiency across the legal value chain.

articles.title: This day, that year: The patent filed on June 2 that helped make radio, television, wi-fi, and mobile communication possible
articles.description: Guglielmo Marconi, a 22-year-old Italian, filed a groundbreaking patent in London on June 2, 1896, for a system of telegraphy using Hertzian waves. This invention, which enabled wireless transmission of signals through the air, laid the foundation for all modern wireless communication technologies, from radio to mobile phones and Wi-Fi.

This advancement, alongside a potential foldable iPhone, could lead to increased production costs and possibly higher prices for premium models. Apple might also alter its launch strategy, introducing premium devices first in September 2026.

articles.title: Obama's White House Instagram Hacked As Strange Message Sparks Questions | WATCH
articles.description: A dormant Obama-era White House Instagram account suddenly became the center of a bizarre hacking mystery after strange AI-generated posts and controversial messages appeared online. The official @obamawhitehouse account, inactive since President Donald Trump's first inauguration in 2017, was reportedly compromised before Meta stepped in to secure it. Who was behind the cyber attack, and why target an account that had been silent for years? Here's everything we know.

articles.title: Photo of the iPhone Fold (in white/silver) shared by Ice Universe
articles.description: Alright, show of hands – who here thought that Apple’s first foldable will be a wide-style device, instead of the more common book-style of flip? Well, that is what Cupertino went for as you can see in the photo shared by Ice Universe on Weibo. This doesn’t come out of the blue – we’ve seen dummies with this design and CAD schematics that revealed the dimensions – 120.6 mm tall and 167.6mm wide (unfolded). When folded, the device is expected to measure 9.23mm (well, 13mm with the camera island). An alleged photo of the Apple iPhone foldable This photo also shows off one of the...

articles.description: The past weekend I had the incredible opportunity to visit the beautiful city of Budapest. articles.title: Investment platform LVX launches Elvix, an AI tool for private market investors
articles.description: LVX Ventures has launched Elvix, an AI platform offering continuous investment feedback. Built on extensive private market data, Elvix helps investors evaluate startups and track portfolio risks. This innovation addresses information gaps in private investing. The platform uses proprietary AI to analyze opportunities and monitor performance. Elvix aims to provide decision intelligence for early-stage and growth investments.
